TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jigme_Khesar_Namgyel_Wangchuck, title = Jigme_Khesar_Namgyel_Wangchuck, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jigme_Khesar_Namgyel_Wangchuck} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1980) mrhuw Bhutan ta' misuw hya' ga Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 2, Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1980) mrhuw Bhutan ta' misuw hya' ga Jigme Khesar Namgyel Wangchuck, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2006 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *iɣme kħes~ɕar namɣjel waŋʦ~ʨħuʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βħutan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *iɣme kħes~ɕar namɣjel waŋʦ~ʨħuʦ~ʨk, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
